subcodes.first_line: O ye denizens of the Kingdom of Creation! Hearken unto that which the Most Glorious Tongue uttereth from the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل ملکوت الانشاء ان استمعوا ما ینطق به لسان الابهی فی سدرة المنتهی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
